Types

DatabaseUrl = distinct string
DatabaseUrlQuery = tuple[key, value: string]
ParsedDatabaseUrl = object
  raw*: string
  scheme*: string
  username*: string
  password*: string
  hostname*: string
  port*: int
  hasPort*: bool
  path*: string
  query*: seq[DatabaseUrlQuery]
